scripts.deploy: npm run build && aws s3 rm s3://base-habitat/ --recursive && aws s3 cp ./dist s3://base-habitat/ --recursive --acl public-read && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E25GW37QHV6BO3 --paths "/*"
scripts.deploy2: npm run build && aws s3 sync ./dist s3://merge-bucket-demo/basehabitat/ --delete --exclude "plus/*" --acl public-read && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E2982IGZBDE88I --paths "/basehabitat" "/basehabitat/*"
